characters.appearance: Not visible in the video. Voiceover only.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मैंने मन में translate करना छोड़ दिया है। [I have stopped translating in my head.]
Character A says: मैं बस Supernova app खोलता हूँ, और AI tutor के साथ real-life situations में बोल कर practice करता हूँ। [I basically open the Supernova app, and practice speaking in real-life situations with the AI tutor.]
Character A says: See? [See?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by revealing a 'secret' to better English, replacing a tedious task with a smart solution.
- Introduces Supernova as the practical alternative to traditional methods.
- Sets a casual, helpful, older-sibling tone.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Teaching my friends how to speak fluent English
I stopped translating. Open Supernova, pick a scenario, and practice speaking with the AI tutor. That's it. I don't memorize grammar.
Congrats! You completed your daily goal
Practice 10 minutes tomorrow to keep your streak!
See my stats
Dismiss

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: मुझे बस ये select करना है कि मुझे interview की practice करनी है या office meeting की। [I just have to select whether I want to practice for an interview or an office meeting.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the ease of use of the app.
- Highlights the real-world scenario feature (interviews, meetings) which appeals to working professionals.
- Keeps the momentum going with a clear action.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Teaching my friends how to speak fluent English
Help me practice for my upcoming job interview so I can answer confidently and build my professional vocabulary, all I

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: अब मैं बस AI के साथ English में बात करता हूँ, और जहाँ मैं अटकता हूँ, वो मुझे तुरंत सही कर देता है। [Now all I do is talk to the AI in English, and wherever I get stuck, it corrects me instantly.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Explains the core mechanism of the AI tutor.
- Emphasizes instant feedback and correction without judgment.
- Reassures the user that making mistakes is part of the process.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Teaching my friends how to speak fluent English
AI Tutor: Hi! Let's start your interview practice. Tell me about yourself.
You: I am... working in sales for two years.
AI Tutor: Great start! You can say, "I have been working in sales for two years." Try saying it again!

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: बस इतना ही करना है, और मेरा English बोलने का confidence अपने आप build हो जाता है। [That's all I gotta do, and my confidence in speaking English builds up automatically.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the emotional payoff of the ad.
- Focuses on the ultimate goal: building confidence to speak without hesitation.
- Ends on a highly encouraging and achievable note.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Teaching my friends how to speak fluent English
